welcomeMessage: Welcome to Yerevan Pulsar. I'm here to help you find out about all the exciting events happening around Yerevan. You can ask me questions about events by day, location, time, category, or price.
pageDescription: Ask questions about events — filter by day, location, time, category, or price.
inputPlaceholder: e.g. What events are at Republic Square on Oct 12?
